PCH Median Improvements Project ¾ Updates:  The project was approved by the Planning Commission on September 8, 2021. Permanent Skate Park ¾ Project Description:  This project includes the designing and constructing a permanent skate park located on the Crummer/Case Court parcel adjacent to Malibu Bluffs Park.  The project would include parking and additional site amenities such as trash cans, benches, tables, and restrooms.

PCH Median Improvements Project ¾ Updates:  Consultant  has submitted the final design changes to Caltrans. Staff received  the  project’s  CDP  from  the  Planning  Commission.    Staff  is coordinating  with  Caltrans  for  the  final  project  approvals.    Interviews were  conducted  with  qualified  consultants  to  provide  construction management  services  in  October  and  staff  is  in  the  final  stages  of selecting a firm. ¾ Project Schedule:

Vehicle Protection Devices ¾ Project Description:  Per Malibu Municipal Code Section 17.48.070 requires vehicle impact protection devices to be installed for all parking spaces located adjacent  to  any  outdoor  pedestrian  seating  area.    There  are  two  locations within the City’s right-of-way  and City-owned property that would require a vehicle impact protection device.
Malibu Bluffs Park South Walkway ¾ Project Description:  This project will include replacing the existing sidewalk located on the south side of Malibu Bluffs Park.
Civic Center Stormwater Diversion Structure ¾ Updates: The contractor has completed construction of the new concrete weir wall located inside LA County box culvert.
